801: # Crunching loop
802: # =============================================================================
803: 
804: TASK_TIMEOUT = 600
805: 
806: 
807: def crunch_lane(
808:     lane_tag: str,
809:     user_id: str,
810:     hardware_tier: str,
811:     chosen_model: str,
812:     max_threads,
813:     cooldown: float,
814:     mode_desc: str,
815:     hardware_label: str,
816:     force_cpu: bool = False,
817:     fancy_ui: bool = True,
818:     pause_event=None,
819:     board=None,
820:     stop_event=None,
821:     dual_controller=None,
822:     parallel_controller=None,
823:     has_gpu: bool = False,
824:     always_use_board: bool = False,
825: ):
826:     """Main crunching loop. Adapted from CUBYZ_FOLDING.py for TUI operation."""
827: 
828:     task_durations: list = []
829:     MAX_DURATION_SAMPLES = 10
830: 
831:     def record_duration(secs: float):
832:         task_durations.append(secs)
833:         del task_durations[:-MAX_DURATION_SAMPLES]
834: 
835:     def avg_task_seconds():
836:         return (sum(task_durations) / len(task_durations)) if task_durations else None
837: 
838:     def speed_str() -> str:
839:         avg = avg_task_seconds()
840:         if avg is None:
841:             return "calculating..."
842:         return f"{avg:.1f}s/chunk avg (last {len(task_durations)})"
843: 
844:     def report(task_desc: str, step_msg: str, comp: int, tot: int, eta):
845:         if board is not None:
846:             board.update(lane_tag, task_desc, step_msg, comp, tot, eta, speed_str())
847: 
848:     def banner(msg: str):
849:         _log_queue.append(msg)
850: 
851:     while True:
852:         try:
853:             if stop_event is not None and stop_event.is_set():
854:                 return
855:             if pause_event is not None and pause_event.is_set():
856:                 time.sleep(1)
857:                 continue
858: 
859:             if fancy_ui:
860:                 update_status, update_info = check_for_update()
861:                 if update_status in ("must_update", "update_available"):
862:                     offer_update(update_status, update_info, mandatory=(update_status == "must_update"))
863: 
864:             avg = avg_task_seconds()
865:             params = (f"?user_id={user_id}&hardware_tier={hardware_tier}"
866:                       f"&model={chosen_model}&client_version={VERSION}&lane={lane_tag}")
867:             if avg is not None:
868:                 params += f"&avg_task_seconds={avg:.2f}"
869: 
870:             try:
871:                 work = make_request(f"{SERVER_URL}/get_work{params}", timeout=30)
872:             except Exception as e:
873:                 banner(f"{Colors.GRAY}[{lane_tag}] Server unreachable: {e}. Retrying in 10s...{Colors.RESET}")
874:                 interruptible_sleep(10, dual_controller, parallel_controller, has_gpu)
875:                 continue
876: 
877:             mode = work.get("mode", "idle")
878:             with _progress_lock:
879:                 _global_progress["mode"] = mode
880: 
881:             if mode == "idle":
882:                 banner(f"{Colors.GRAY}[{lane_tag}] Server idle -- no tasks. Polling in 30s...{Colors.RESET}")
883:                 report("(idle)", "Waiting for tasks...", 0, 0, None)
884:                 interruptible_sleep(30, dual_controller, parallel_controller, has_gpu)
885:                 continue
886: 
887:             if work.get("status") == "complete":
888:                 banner(f"{Colors.GREEN}[{lane_tag}] Campaign complete!{Colors.RESET}")
889:                 report("(done)", "Campaign complete!",
890:                        work.get("completed_chunks", 0), work.get("total_chunks", 0), None)
891:                 interruptible_sleep(60, dual_controller, parallel_controller, has_gpu)
892:                 continue
893: 
894:             task      = work.get("task", {})
895:             chunk_id  = task.get("chunk_id", "?")
896:             comp      = work.get("completed_chunks", 0)
897:             tot       = work.get("total_chunks", 1)
898:             eta       = work.get("eta_seconds")
899:             task_type = work.get("task_type", "")
900:             mode_badge = f"[{mode.upper()}/{task_type.upper()}]" if task_type else f"[{mode.upper()}]"
901:             task_desc  = f"{mode_badge} {chunk_id}"
902: 
903:             report(task_desc, "Processing...", comp, tot, eta)
904: 
905:             dispatch_time = time.time()
906:             # Process task (call Ollama via real prompt from CUBYZ_FOLDING.py in production)
907:             try:
908:                 prompt = f"[{mode.upper()}] Process chunk: {chunk_id}"
909:                 _ollama_generate(chosen_model, prompt, force_cpu=force_cpu, timeout=TASK_TIMEOUT)
910:                 result_ok = True
911:             except Exception as e:
912:                 banner(f"{Colors.RED}[{lane_tag}] Ollama error on {chunk_id}: {e}{Colors.RESET}")
913:                 result_ok = False
914: 
915:             if not result_ok:
916:                 if cooldown:
917:                     interruptible_sleep(cooldown, dual_controller, parallel_controller, has_gpu)
918:                 continue
919: 
920:             # Submit
921:             try:
922:                 sub_payload = {
923:                     "mode": mode, "chunk_id": chunk_id, "user_id": user_id,
924:                     "hardware_tier": hardware_tier, "client_version": VERSION,
925:                 }
926:                 make_request(f"{SERVER_URL}/submit_work", sub_payload, timeout=30)
927:                 elapsed = time.time() - dispatch_time
928:                 record_duration(elapsed)
929:                 report(task_desc, f"OK Submitted ({elapsed:.1f}s)", comp, tot, eta)
930:                 banner(f"{Colors.GREEN}[{lane_tag}] OK {chunk_id} -- {elapsed:.1f}s{Colors.RESET}")
931:             except Exception as e:
932:                 banner(f"{Colors.RED}[{lane_tag}] Submit failed: {e}{Colors.RESET}")
933: 
934:             if cooldown:
935:                 interruptible_sleep(cooldown, dual_controller, parallel_controller, has_gpu)
936: 
937:         except SystemExit:
938:             raise
939:         except Exception as e:
940:             banner(f"{Colors.RED}[{lane_tag}] Error: {e}. Retrying in 5s...{Colors.RESET}")
941:             interruptible_sleep(5, dual_controller, parallel_controller, has_gpu)
942: 
943: 
944: def _background_lane(**kwargs):
945:     try:
946:         crunch_lane(**kwargs)
947:     except SystemExit as se:
948:         _log_queue.append(f"\n{Colors.YELLOW}[{kwargs.get('lane_tag', '?')}] Lane stopped: {se}{Colors.RESET}")
949: 
950: 
951: # =============================================================================
952: # DualLaneController / ParallelWorkerPoolController
953: # =============================================================================
954: 
955: class DualLaneController:
956:     def __init__(self, board: TuiStatusBoard, cpu_lane_kwargs: dict):
957:         self.board           = board
958:         self.cpu_lane_kwargs = cpu_lane_kwargs
959:         self.pause_event     = threading.Event()
960:         self.active          = False
961:         self._thread         = None
962:         self._stop_event     = None
963: 
964:     def start(self):
965:         if self.active:
966:             return
967:         self.board.set_label(self.cpu_lane_kwargs["lane_tag"], self.cpu_lane_kwargs["hardware_label"])
968:         self._stop_event = threading.Event()
969:         kwargs = dict(self.cpu_lane_kwargs, board=self.board, always_use_board=True,
970:                       pause_event=self.pause_event, stop_event=self._stop_event)
971:         self._thread = threading.Thread(target=_background_lane, kwargs=kwargs, daemon=True)
972:         self._thread.start()
973:         self.active = True
974: 
975:     def stop(self):
976:         if not self.active:
977:             return
978:         self._stop_event.set()
979:         self.active = False
980:         self.board.drop_lane(self.cpu_lane_kwargs["lane_tag"])
981: 
982: 
983: class ParallelWorkerPoolController:
984:     def __init__(self, worker_kwargs: dict, user_id: str, hardware_tier: str,
985:                  total_vram_gb: float, system_ram_gb: float, force_cpu: bool,
986:                  board: TuiStatusBoard):
987:         self.worker_kwargs = worker_kwargs
988:         self.user_id       = user_id
989:         self.hardware_tier = hardware_tier
990:         self.total_vram_gb = total_vram_gb
991:         self.system_ram_gb = system_ram_gb
992:         self.force_cpu     = force_cpu
993:         self.board         = board
994:         self.worker_count  = PARALLEL_WORKERS_BY_TIER.get(hardware_tier, 1)
995:         self.active        = False
996:         self._threads:     list = []
997:         self._stop_events: list = []
998:         self._lane_tags:   list = []
999: 
1000:     def check_headroom(self) -> tuple:
1001:         if self.force_cpu:
1002:             floor    = CPU_TIER_RAM_FLOOR_GB.get(self.hardware_tier, 0.0)
1003:             per_w    = PARALLEL_WORKERS_RAM_HEADROOM_PER_WORKER_GB.get(self.hardware_tier, 3.0)
1004:             required = floor + per_w * self.worker_count
1005:             if self.system_ram_gb >= required:
1006:                 return True, ""
1007:             return False, f"needs {required:.1f} GB RAM, have {self.system_ram_gb:.1f} GB"
1008:         floor    = GPU_TIER_VRAM_FLOOR_GB.get(self.hardware_tier, 0.0)
1009:         per_w    = PARALLEL_WORKERS_VRAM_HEADROOM_PER_WORKER_GB.get(self.hardware_tier, 3.5)
1010:         required = floor + per_w * self.worker_count
1011:         if self.total_vram_gb >= required:
1012:             return True, ""
1013:         return False, f"needs {required:.1f} GB VRAM, have {self.total_vram_gb:.1f} GB"
1014: 
1015:     def start(self) -> tuple:
1016:         if self.active:
1017:             return True, ""
1018:         ok, reason = self.check_headroom()
1019:         if not ok:
1020:             return False, reason
1021:         self._threads, self._stop_events, self._lane_tags = [], [], []
1022:         suffixes = "pqrstuvwxyz"
1023:         for i in range(self.worker_count):
1024:             stop_event = threading.Event()
1025:             worker_id  = self.user_id[:11] + suffixes[i % len(suffixes)]
1026:             lane_tag   = f"P{i + 1}"
1027:             self.board.set_label(lane_tag, f"Parallel worker {i + 1}")
1028:             kwargs = dict(self.worker_kwargs, user_id=worker_id, lane_tag=lane_tag,
1029:                           stop_event=stop_event, board=self.board, always_use_board=True)
1030:             t = threading.Thread(target=_background_lane, kwargs=kwargs, daemon=True)
1031:             t.start()
1032:             self._threads.append(t)
1033:             self._stop_events.append(stop_event)
1034:             self._lane_tags.append(lane_tag)
1035:         self.active = True
1036:         return True, ""
1037: 
1038:     def stop(self):
1039:         if not self.active:
1040:             return
1041:         for tag in self._lane_tags:
1042:             self.board.drop_lane(tag)
1043:         self._lane_tags = []
1044:         for e in self._stop_events:
1045:             e.set()
1046:         self._threads, self._stop_events = [], []
1047:         self.active = False
1048: 
1049: 
1050: # =============================================================================
1051: # Textual TUI
1052: # =============================================================================
1053: 
1054: class _LanesPanel(RichLog):
1055:     """Centre panel: one box per active lane, live-updated every 0.5 s."""
1056: 
1057:     def __init__(self, **kwargs):
1058:         super().__init__(wrap=False, markup=False, auto_scroll=False, **kwargs)
1059:         self._last_render: str = ""
1060: 
1061:     def on_mount(self):
1062:         self.set_interval(0.5, self._refresh)
1063: 
1064:     def _refresh(self):
1065:         width  = self.content_size.width or 80
1066:         lines  = self._build(width)
1067:         render = "\n".join(lines)
1068:         if render == self._last_render:
1069:             return
1070:         self._last_render = render
1071:         self.clear()
1072:         for line in lines:
1073:             self.write(Text.from_ansi(line, no_wrap=True, overflow="crop"))
1074: 
1075:     @staticmethod
1076:     def _build(width: int) -> list:
1077:         LANE_COLORS = ["\033[96m", "\033[95m", "\033[93m", "\033[94m", "\033[92m", "\033[91m"]
1078:         sep         = chr(9472) * max(1, width - 2)
1079: 
1080:         with _lane_lock:
1081:             order = list(_lane_order)
1082:             state = {k: dict(v) for k, v in _lane_state.items()}
1083: 
1084:         if not order:
1085:             return [f"  \033[90m No active lanes yet...\033[0m"]
1086: 
1087:         lines = []
1088:         for i, tag in enumerate(order):
1089:             info   = state.get(tag, {})
1090:             color  = LANE_COLORS[i % len(LANE_COLORS)]
1091:             label  = info.get("label",  tag)
1092:             task   = info.get("task",   "(waiting...)")
1093:             status = info.get("status", "")
1094:             speed  = info.get("speed",  "calculating...")
1095: 
1096:             if status.startswith("OK") or status.startswith(chr(10003)):
1097:                 sc = "\033[92m"
1098:             elif "fail" in status.lower() or status.startswith("X"):
1099:                 sc = "\033[91m"
1100:             else:
1101:                 sc = ""
1102: 
1103:             tag_col = f" {color}{tag:<3}\033[0m"
1104:             lines.append(f"{tag_col} {chr(9474)} {label}")
1105:             lines.append(f"      {chr(9474)} Task  : {task}")
1106:             lines.append(f"      {chr(9474)} Status: {sc}{status}\033[0m")
1107:             lines.append(f"      {chr(9474)} Speed : {speed}")
1108:             lines.append(f"{color}{sep}\033[0m")
1109: 
1110:         return lines
1111: 
1112: 
1113: class _HeaderPanel(Static):
1114:     """Full-width top bar: mode + volunteer name + progress bar + ETA."""
1115: 
1116:     def __init__(self, **kwargs):
1117:         super().__init__("", **kwargs)
1118:         self._last: str = ""
1119: 
1120:     def on_mount(self):
1121:         self.set_interval(1, self._refresh)
1122: 
1123:     def _refresh(self):
1124:         text = self._build(self.content_size.width or 80)
1125:         if text != self._last:
1126:             self._last = text
1127:             self.update(Text.from_ansi(text))
1128: 
1129:     @staticmethod
1130:     def _build(width: int) -> str:
1131:         with _progress_lock:
1132:             comp = _global_progress["comp"]
1133:             tot  = _global_progress["tot"]
1134:             eta  = _global_progress["eta"]
1135:             mode = _global_progress["mode"]
1136: 
1137:         mc     = MODE_COLORS.get(mode, "\033[94m")
1138:         ml     = MODE_LABELS.get(mode, mode.upper())
1139:         vol    = _volunteer_id or "?"
1140:         clock  = time.strftime("%H:%M:%S")
1141:         pct    = (comp / tot * 100) if tot else 0.0
1142:         bar_w  = max(10, width - 55)
1143:         filled = round(bar_w * pct / 100)
1144:         bar    = f"\033[92m{chr(9608) * filled}\033[0m\033[2m{chr(9617) * (bar_w - filled)}\033[0m"
1145:         eta_s  = format_eta(eta)
1146: 
1147:         left_plain  = f" CUBYZ CLIENT  [{ml}]  {vol}"
1148:         right_plain = clock
1149:         pad         = max(1, width - len(left_plain) - len(right_plain) - 2)
1150:         line1       = (f" \033[1mCUBYZ CLIENT\033[0m"
1151:                        f"  {mc}\033[1m{ml}\033[0m"
1152:                        f"  \033[96m{vol}\033[0m"
1153:                        + " " * pad + clock)
1154:         label2 = f"  {format_count(comp)}/{format_count(tot)} ({pct:.1f}%)  ETA: {eta_s}"
1155:         line2  = f"  [{bar}]{label2}"
1156:         return line1 + "\n" + line2
1157: 
1158: 
1159: class _TerminalPanel(RichLog):
1160:     """Bottom panel: all startup/runtime output, scrollable."""
1161: 
1162:     def __init__(self, **kwargs):
1163:         super().__init__(wrap=True, markup=False, auto_scroll=True, **kwargs)
1164: 
1165:     def on_mount(self):
1166:         self.set_interval(0.25, self._drain)
1167: 
1168:     def _drain(self):
1169:         while _log_queue:
1170:             try:
1171:                 line = _log_queue.popleft()
1172:             except IndexError:
1173:                 break
1174:             self.write(Text.from_ansi(line))
1175:

1290:     BINDINGS = [("q", "quit", "Quit")]
1291: 
1292:     def compose(self) -> ComposeResult:
1293:         with Vertical(id="sidebar"):
1294:             yield Label("CUBYZ CLIENT", id="sidebar-title")
1295:             yield Label("Actions", classes="section-label")
1296:             yield Button("Leaderboard",   id="btn_leaderboard", classes="action-btn")
1297:             yield Button("Active Users",  id="btn_users",       classes="action-btn")
1298:             yield Label("Settings", classes="section-label")
1299:             yield Button("Rename ID",           id="btn_rename",   classes="action-btn")
1300:             yield Button("Toggle Dual-Lane",    id="btn_dual",     classes="action-btn")
1301:             yield Button("Toggle Parallel",     id="btn_parallel", classes="action-btn")
1302:             yield Label("Diagnostics", classes="section-label")
1303:             yield Button("GPU Diagnostic",      id="btn_gpu_diag",   classes="action-btn")
1304:             yield Button("Clear Benchmark",     id="btn_benchmark",  classes="warn-btn")
1305:             yield Label("", classes="section-label")
1306:             yield Button("Safe Exit",           id="btn_exit",       classes="danger-btn")
1307: 
1308:         with Vertical(id="main"):
1309:             yield _HeaderPanel(id="topbar")
1310:             yield _LanesPanel(id="lanes")
1311:             yield _TerminalPanel(id="terminal")
1312:             with Horizontal(id="input-row"):
1313:                 yield Label(">", id="prompt-label")
1314:                 yield Input(placeholder="Type response to prompts here and press Enter", id="user-input")
1315: 
1316:     def on_input_submitted(self, event: Input.Submitted) -> None:
1317:         text = event.value.strip()
1318:         event.input.value = ""
1319:         if text:
1320:             _log_queue.append(f"\033[96m> {text}\033[0m")
1321:             _input_queue.put(text)
1322: 
1323:     def on_button_pressed(self, event: Button.Pressed) -> None:
1324:         bid = event.button.id
1325: 
1326:         if bid == "btn_leaderboard":
1327:             def _fetch():
1328:                 text = fetch_leaderboard_text()
1329:                 for line in text.split("\n"):
1330:                     _log_queue.append(line)
1331:             threading.Thread(target=_fetch, daemon=True).start()
1332: 
1333:         elif bid == "btn_users":
1334:             def _fetch():
1335:                 text = fetch_userlist_text()
1336:                 for line in text.split("\n"):
1337:                     _log_queue.append(line)
1338:             threading.Thread(target=_fetch, daemon=True).start()
1339: 
1340:         elif bid == "btn_rename":
1341:             def _do_rename():
1342:                 current = load_saved_user()
1343:                 new_id  = _tui_input(f"Current: {current}. Enter new ID (3-12 letters, blank = cancel): ")
1344:                 if not new_id:
1345:                     _log_queue.append(f"\033[90m[~] Rename cancelled.\033[0m")
1346:                     return
1347:                 if not is_valid_user_id(new_id):
1348:                     _log_queue.append(f"\033[91m[X] Invalid ID -- 3-12 letters only.\033[0m")
1349:                     return
1350:                 try:
1351:                     make_request(f"{SERVER_URL}/rename_user?old_user_id={current}&new_user_id={new_id}", timeout=15)
1352:                 except Exception as e:
1353:                     _log_queue.append(f"\033[91m[X] Rename failed: {e}\033[0m")
1354:                     return
1355:                 save_user(new_id)
1356:                 _log_queue.append(f"\033[92m[OK] Renamed to '{new_id}'. Restart to apply.\033[0m")
1357:             threading.Thread(target=_do_rename, daemon=True).start()
1358: 
1359:         elif bid == "btn_dual":
1360:             dc = _dual_controller_ref
1361:             if dc is None:
1362:                 _log_queue.append(f"\033[90m[~] Dual-lane not available on this machine.\033[0m")
1363:             elif dc.active:
1364:                 dc.stop()
1365:                 _log_queue.append(f"\033[90m[OK] Dual-lane DISABLED.\033[0m")
1366:             else:
1367:                 dc.start()
1368:                 _log_queue.append(f"\033[92m[OK] Dual-lane ENABLED.\033[0m")
1369: 
1370:         elif bid == "btn_parallel":
1371:             pc = _parallel_controller_ref
1372:             if pc is None:
1373:                 _log_queue.append(f"\033[90m[~] Parallel workers not available.\033[0m")
1374:             elif pc.active:
1375:                 pc.stop()
1376:                 _log_queue.append(f"\033[90m[OK] Parallel workers DISABLED.\033[0m")
1377:             else:
1378:                 started, reason = pc.start()
1379:                 if started:
1380:                     _log_queue.append(f"\033[92m[OK] Parallel workers ENABLED.\033[0m")
1381:                 else:
1382:                     _log_queue.append(f"\033[91m[X] Cannot enable: {reason}\033[0m")
1383: 
1384:         elif bid == "btn_benchmark":
1385:             def _do():
1386:                 save_benchmark_result({})
1387:                 _log_queue.append(f"\033[96m[~] Benchmark cache cleared. Restart to re-benchmark.\033[0m")
1388:             threading.Thread(target=_do, daemon=True).start()
1389: 
1390:         elif bid == "btn_gpu_diag":
1391:             threading.Thread(target=run_live_gpu_diagnostic, daemon=True).start()
1392: 
1393:         elif bid == "btn_exit":
1394:             self.exit()
1395: 
1396:     def action_quit(self):
1397:         self.exit()
1398:

1404: def main():

1406:

1411: 
1412:         print(f"\033[1m=== CAFS -- Cubyz AI Folding System (TUI v{VERSION}) ===\033[0m")
1413: 
1414:         # Volunteer ID

1421:             user_id = ""
1422:             while not is_valid_user_id(user_id):
1423:                 user_id = input("Enter your volunteer ID (3-12 letters): ").strip()
1424:             save_user(user_id)
1425: 
1426:         _volunteer_id = user_id
1427:         with _progress_lock:
1428:             _global_progress["mode"] = "idle"
1429: 
1430:         # Auto-update preference

1432:             print(f"\n\033[96m\033[1m[i] AUTO-UPDATE OPTION\033[0m")
1433:             print(f"\033[96m    y = download and restart automatically when updates release")
1434:             print(f"    n = ask me each time\033[0m")
1435:             choice = input("Enable auto-update? (y/n): ").strip().lower()
1436:             save_auto_update_preference(choice == 'y')
1437:             print(f"\033[92m[OK] Auto-update {'enabled' if choice == 'y' else 'disabled'}.\033[0m")
1438: 
1439:         # Version check

1443:         elif update_status == "update_available":
1444:             offer_update(update_status, update_info, mandatory=False)
1445:         elif update_status == "check_failed":
1446:             print(f"\033[90m[~] Could not reach server for update check -- continuing.\033[0m")
1447:

1453:         _has_gpu = gpu_type != "cpu"
1454: 
1455:         if gpu_type == "cpu":
1456:             chosen_model = cpu_model
1457:

1462:         if gpu_type != "cpu" and chosen_model != cpu_model:
1463:             ensure_ollama_running_and_model_pulled(cpu_model)
1464: 
1465:         # Benchmark
1466:         primary_is_gpu = gpu_type != "cpu"
1467:         gpu_time = cpu_time = None
1468:         gpu_error = cpu_error = None
1469: 
1470:         if gpu_type != "cpu":
1471:             fingerprint = f"v{BENCHMARK_VERSION}:{gpu_type}:{round(total_vram_gb,1)}:{os.cpu_count()}:{round(system_ram_gb,1)}:{chosen_model}:{cpu_model}"
1472:             cached = load_benchmark_result()
1473:             if cached.get("fingerprint") == fingerprint:
1474:                 primary_is_gpu = cached["primary_is_gpu"]
1475:                 gpu_time  = cached.get("gpu_time")
1476:                 cpu_time  = cached.get("cpu_time")
1477:                 gpu_error = cached.get("gpu_error")
1478:                 cpu_error = cached.get("cpu_error")
1479:                 print(f"\033[92m[OK] Using cached benchmark result.\033[0m")
1480:             else:
1481:                 print(f"\033[96m[~] Running hardware benchmark (one-time, up to 2 minutes)...\033[0m")
1482:                 _bench = {}

1484:                 if arch_bad:

1486:                     _bench["gpu"] = (None, arch_reason)
1487:                     gpu_t = None
1488:                 else:
1489:                     gpu_t = threading.Thread(

1491:                         daemon=True)
1492:                     gpu_t.start()
1493:                 cpu_t = threading.Thread(

1495:                     daemon=True)
1496:                 cpu_t.start()
1497:                 if gpu_t:
1498:                     gpu_t.join()
1499:                 cpu_t.join()
1500:                 gpu_time, gpu_error = _bench.get("gpu", (None, None))
1501:                 cpu_time, cpu_error = _bench.get("cpu", (None, None))
1502:                 gpu_tier_cmp = gpu_tier_from_vram(total_vram_gb)
1503: 
1504:                 if gpu_time is None:
